heading: Availability of funds appropriated for Agricultural Research Service for research related to tobacco or tobacco products
label: 2254a Availability of funds appropriated for Agricultural Research Service for research related to tobacco or tobacco products
text: On and after , none of the funds appropriated under this heading shall be available to carry out research related to the production, processing, or marketing of tobacco or tobacco products.December 26, 2007
notes: References in TextThis heading, referred to in text, refers to the headings “” and “” of title I of div. A of the Consolidated Appropriations Act, 2008, .Agricultural Research Servicesalaries and expensesPub. L. 110–161
